Welcome to the {{ $json.trainingProgram }} Training Program!

Thank you for registering on behalf of {{ $json.companyName }}.

We are pleased to welcome you to the {{ $json.trainingProgram }} training program.

Your Assigned Training Manager

{{ $('18 - Assign Manager').item.json.managerName }}
{{ $('18 - Assign Manager').item.json.managerDepartment }}
{{ $('19 - Assign Training Resources').item.json.managerEmail }}

Training Information

  • Training Portal: {{ $('19 - Assign Training Resources').item.json.trainingPortal }}
  • Assessment: {{ $('19 - Assign Training Resources').item.json.assesmentType }}
  • Assessment Due: {{ $('19 - Assign Training Resources').item.json.assessmentDueDays }} days

If you need any assistance, please contact: {{ $('19 - Assign Training Resources').item.json.supportEmail }}


Best Regards,
Partner Enablement Team
